Model Template Gallery
Select a model template to populate the RVI with pre-configured methods, processes, and soil model. Your existing SubBasins, HRUs, gauges, and rvt data will be preserved. Use :CreateRVPTemplate (in Output Flags) to auto-generate the matching .rvp file.
